name: @vectros-ai/sdk
description: Vectros AI Platform SDK for Node.js

scripts.build: tsup index.ts --format cjs,esm --clean --out-dir dist && tsc -p tsconfig.dts.json && cp dist/index.d.ts dist/index.d.mts
scripts.prepublishOnly: tsup index.ts --format cjs,esm --clean --out-dir dist && tsc -p tsconfig.dts.json && cp dist/index.d.ts dist/index.d.mts
